notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers hit by pitch. Carlos Cortes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas lines out to second baseman Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to shortstop Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.
